event.prompt_text: How should an AI answer prove that cited sources really support its claims?
event.response_text: A reliable AI answer should cite sources only when candidate documents contain the answer-critical facts, reject topical anti-documents, publish footer source rows, and route uncertain attribution to escrow.

claims.claim_text: A reliable AI answer should cite sources only when candidate documents contain the answer-critical facts.
required_evidence_phrases: candidate documents contain the answer-critical facts

claims.claim_text: Uncertain attribution should be routed to escrow rather than paid directly.

candidate_documents.title: Pinpoint Provenance Manual
candidate_documents.content: Pinpoint provenance requires candidate documents contain the answer-critical facts before a model may cite them. The mechanism rejects topical anti-documents and routes uncertain attribution to escrow rather than direct payout.

candidate_documents.title: Topical Citation Overview
candidate_documents.content: Citation systems, source footers, AI answer confidence, documents, facts, and attribution are important topics for trustworthy user interfaces.

candidate_documents.title: General AI Trust Note
candidate_documents.content: Trustworthy AI systems should provide explanations, confidence estimates, and user-visible references where available.
